title: chenopodium rubrum var. botryoides
intro: Chenopodium rubrum var. botryoides, also known as red goosefoot, is a variety of the Chenopodium rubrum plant, which is a flowering plant species in the amaranth family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chenopodium rubrum var. botryoides include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used in poultices to treat skin conditions.
